home-par1: AGHIST is the search portal for agricultural, food and environmental history. It is run by the Archive of Rural History (ARH) and provides direct access to online resources (catalogue records, films, photographs and written sources, as well as catalogue records, academic texts and video essays) made publicly available by the ARH and its partner institutions in Switzerland and abroad.
